hero.name: Kunanon Srisuntiroj
hero.title: IT Professional
hero.greeting: こんにちは, สวัสดี, Hello.
hero.tagline: A developer, teacher, and quiet tinkerer. I build tools I trust, teach what I learn, and leave room for the human in between.

about.title: About Me
about.introduction: Beyond his professional life, Kunanon cherishes his travels to Kumamoto, Japan. It's his personality that drives his creativity, straightforwardness, and self-awareness, reflecting his values of confident humility and innovation.
about.university_name: King Mongkut's Institute of Technology Ladkrabang

projects.title: Super
projects.description: Personal portfolio website built with Next.js and Cloudflare Pages, integrating with Superbrain API. Orchestrated development using Gemini 2.5 Flash/Pro models for code generation and task execution.
projects.context: No standard portfolio template conveyed Kunanon's full technical depth — he needed a site that was both visually distinctive and developer-credible. He built this site from scratch with Next.js, Cloudflare Pages, and integration with his own Superbrain API, orchestrating development with Gemini 2.5 models. The result is the live portfolio at sagelga.com, serving as both a showcase and a working demonstration of his full-stack capabilities.

projects.title: Superbrain
projects.description: API for blog content, retrieving Notion changes and storing them in Cloudflare D2 for fast retrieval. Fully runs on Cloudflare Workers; orchestrated development using Gemini models.
projects.context: Serving blog content directly from Notion introduced latency and API rate-limit risk at any meaningful traffic scale. Kunanon designed a pipeline on Cloudflare Workers that listens for Notion changes, normalises the content, and stores it in Cloudflare D1 for millisecond reads. The outcome is a serverless backend that decouples the CMS from the delivery layer and scales to any traffic volume with zero infrastructure overhead.

projects.title: Todoist Notion Sync
projects.description: Utilizes Cloudflare Worker to listen to Webhook from Todoist and create a new task in Notion.
projects.context: Manually copying completed Todoist tasks into a Notion database for review was a daily friction point that broke focus. He deployed a lightweight Cloudflare Worker that subscribes to Todoist webhooks and automatically creates a matching entry in the target Notion database on every task event. This eliminated the manual step entirely, keeping both tools in sync without any recurring maintenance.

projects.title: Learn with sagelga
projects.description: Rebuilt learn.sagelga.com with Docusaurus, React, and TypeScript, enhancing search and speed to empower Python and SQL learners.
projects.context: The original learn.sagelga.com had slow page loads and poor search, which undercut the learning experience for Python and SQL students. Kunanon rebuilt the site with Docusaurus, React, and TypeScript, applying performance tuning and improved search indexing throughout. Students now have a faster, more navigable reference — and Kunanon has a low-friction platform for publishing new lessons.

projects.title: Byteside.one
projects.description: Founded ByteSide.one, a tech, gadget, and gaming news publication, achieving 2.79 million Google Search impressions and 200k+ monthly Facebook impressions by Jan 2023.
projects.context: Thai-language tech and gaming audiences had few high-quality local publications they could trust for timely, well-researched coverage. Kunanon founded ByteSide.one and grew it to 2.79 million Google Search impressions and over 200,000 monthly Facebook impressions by January 2023. The publication proved that a small, focused editorial team could compete for organic search visibility with larger media brands.

projects.title: The Sunny Side Publication
projects.description: Pioneered 'The Sunny Side' publication on Medium, a precursor to ByteSide.one, showcasing early content creation and publishing expertise.
projects.context: Before ByteSide.one existed, Kunanon wanted a low-barrier outlet to develop a publishing voice and experiment with long-form tech content. He launched The Sunny Side on Medium as a personal publication, learning audience development, editorial rhythm, and SEO fundamentals along the way. That experience became the direct foundation for the editorial strategy later applied at ByteSide.one.

projects.title: Approval Workflow on Google Apps Script
projects.description: Developed an automated approval workflow for IMST using Google Apps Script, streamlining IT, Requisition, and Procurement processes with automated email triggers and Google Forms integration.
projects.context: IMST's IT, Requisition, and Procurement approvals were handled manually via email chains, causing delays and lost requests. Kunanon built an automated approval workflow using Google Apps Script, Google Forms, and automated email triggers — keeping all parties notified without manual follow-up. The system standardised the process and reduced approval turnaround time across all three departments.

projects.title: Essilor Asia Supplier Deduplication Report
projects.description: Developed Oracle SQL and PL/SQL scripts for Essilor Asia and Europe, generating supplier deduplication reports to enhance data quality in production Oracle ERP, including similarity scoring and normalization.
projects.context: Essilor's Oracle ERP contained duplicate supplier records across Asia and Europe, inflating procurement costs and complicating spend analysis. Kunanon developed Oracle SQL and PL/SQL scripts that applied similarity scoring and name normalisation to surface likely duplicates, generating structured deduplication reports for the data stewardship team. The deliverable gave Essilor's procurement analysts a clear, prioritised list to action, directly improving master data quality in production.

projects.title: Data Analytics on Body Fat
projects.description: Conducted multi-regression analysis on body fat and body part size relationships using IBM SPSS Statistics to create statistical models.
projects.context: Understanding which body measurements are the strongest predictors of body fat percentage has value for health and fitness applications, but few accessible analyses existed for non-specialist audiences. Kunanon conducted multi-variable regression analysis using IBM SPSS Statistics, examining relationships between body fat and multiple body-part measurements. The resulting statistical models quantified the predictive strength of each variable and served as a practical demonstration of applied regression methodology.

projects.title: Lecture sharing System (Oh Sheet!)
projects.description: Developed 'Oh Sheet!', a lecture sharing system using Vue, Parse, NodeJS, ExpressJS, and Digital Ocean Spaces, designed for easy sharing and discovery of educational content.
projects.context: University students had no centralised, searchable place to share or discover lecture notes and study materials. Kunanon and a team built Oh Sheet! — a full-stack web application using Vue, Parse, Node.js, Express.js, and Digital Ocean Spaces — that let users upload, tag, and search educational content. The platform provided a self-service hub for peer-to-peer academic resource sharing.

projects.title: Online Space Reservation System
projects.description: Designed and implemented an online space reservation system with PostgreSQL, Scala, GraphQL, and NodeJS, managing user requirements and approvals for building administrators.
projects.context: A campus building lacked any digital way for occupants to book shared spaces, leading to double-bookings and administrator overhead. Kunanon's team designed and built a reservation system backed by PostgreSQL, Scala, and GraphQL, with a Node.js API layer and an approval workflow for building administrators. The system replaced ad-hoc booking with a structured, tracked, and auditable process.

projects.title: Thai restaurant analysis
projects.description: Analyzed the prevalence of Thai restaurants in the United States, investigating underlying causes and trends.
projects.context: The question of why Thai restaurants are disproportionately prevalent in the United States compared to other cuisines had been noted anecdotally but rarely quantified. Kunanon gathered and analysed restaurant data using Python, investigating regional distribution patterns and the historical and policy factors that may have influenced them. The analysis surfaced concrete trends and offered data-backed context for a culturally interesting question.

projects.title: Trash Melody
projects.description: Developed 'Trash Melody', a fast-paced OSU!-inspired Java game, combining entertainment with education on trash categorization.
projects.context: Teaching people to correctly sort waste categories is difficult when the information feels abstract or boring. Kunanon built Trash Melody, an OSU!-inspired rhythm game in Java where players sort falling items into the correct trash bin under time pressure. The game paired genuine educational content with fast-paced mechanics, making waste categorisation memorable and engaging.

projects.title: Point of Sales (POS) System
projects.description: Engineered a comprehensive Point-of-Sale (POS) system in C, featuring analytics, stock/profit management, sales forecasting (Linear Regression), customer loyalty, and barcode scanner support, with data stored in CSV format.
projects.context: Small vendors often rely on spreadsheets or pen-and-paper for sales tracking, missing out on inventory control and business intelligence. Kunanon engineered a full POS system in C with modules for sales analytics, stock management, profit tracking, sales forecasting via Linear Regression, customer loyalty points, and barcode scanner support — storing all data in CSV files for portability. The system delivered enterprise-level reporting features in a dependency-free, offline-capable tool.

experiences.title: Freelance Teacher
description: Educate individuals and small groups on fundamental programming concepts and practical application of Python and SQL for data manipulation and analysis.
Develop customized curriculum and teaching materials tailored to diverse learning styles and skill levels.
Provide hands-on training and project-based learning experiences to reinforce understanding and build practical skills in database management and scripting.
Instruct on advanced usage of Notion for personal organization, project management, and collaborative workspaces, demonstrating its versatility as a productivity tool.

experiences.title: Salesforce Business Analyst
description: Collaborated with a leading insurance company to design and implement comprehensive Salesforce dashboards for Financial Advisors and their managers.
Developed key performance indicators (KPIs) and reporting mechanisms within Salesforce to enable real-time tracking of revenue, customer acquisition, and client engagement metrics.
Streamlined data visualization processes, empowering financial teams with actionable insights to optimize sales strategies and enhance client relationships.
Provided ongoing support and training to users, ensuring effective adoption and utilization of the new Salesforce functionalities.

experiences.title: Salesforce Marketing Cloud Developer
description: Collaborated with Thailand's leading oil and retail enterprise to maintain and develop Salesforce Marketing Cloud with Knowesis solutions (Sift and Opolo), thereby facilitating data-driven, omnichannel marketing campaigns.

Developed automation for personalized customer campaign journeys using Salesforce’s Journey Builder and Automation Studio, importing and exporting data between customer engagement and analytics platforms such as Informatica, Cloudera, and Knowesis Sift.
Optimized SQL queries to efficiently retrieve campaign leads from analytics platforms, to reduce data retrieval time and enable faster campaign execution.
Developed campaign summary reports such as email open rates, click-through rates, campaign offerings, and automation status.
Improved email templates and landing pages using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Salesforce AMPScript, enhancing responsiveness and compatibility across devices and modern email clients.
Initiated a proactive contingency plan to handle Marketing Cloud’s maintenance periods, ensuring no disruptions to critical marketing campaigns and data flow automations.

experiences.title: Web Developer, Administrator, and Content Creator
description: Founded a technology, gadget, and gaming news publication, reaching 125,000 website visits and 400,000 monthly post impressions on Facebook.
Architected and implemented scalable website infrastructure using WordPress, Cloudflare, AWS Lightsail and AWS CloudFront, ensuring optimal content delivery and security.

Executed omnichannel content monetization strategies, including Google AdSense and affiliate marketing across multiple mediums and affiliate networks, ensuring a sustainable business model for the publication.

experiences.title: Cooperative Studies Student
description: Developed Approval Workflow, built-in to Google Sheets using Google Apps Script (JavaScript-based language), reducing costs and streamlining Essilor Shared Service's Approval Request workflow.
Gathered business requirements from users and maintainers.
Coordinated with the Master Data Management (MDM) team to maintain the service.
Approval Workflow is currently in use across Essilor Shared Service's Requisition Department and IT Procurement Team.
Shared knowledge and created documentation for Approval Workflow.
Also developed Data Duplication and Cleaning Reports using OracleSQL and PL/SQL, improving Essilor's global supplier data quality.
Developed Approval Workflow using Google Apps Script (JavaScript-based language), Google Sheets, Google Forms, and Gmail.
Developed Duplication Report using OracleSQL and PL/SQL and deployed it to Oracle ERP.
Taught OracleSQL and Git to the team.
Created documentation for Duplication Reports.

volunteering.title: Senior advisor and referee
description: Advisor and referee in 'PHP and JavaScript' competition on IT Open House 2018.

volunteering.title: Education Team Member
description: Guided new students through foundational Python 3 coding and problem-solving skills.
Launched the IT KMITL Python Pre-programming course on YouTube, providing an on-demand online resource for anyone learning Python.

volunteering.title: Teaching Director
description: Introduced new students to cloud computing concepts using Amazon Web Services.
